title: The Straw Hats Turn the Raid Around
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Zoro, King as The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.
scene: The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Bridal claw!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Now we're even!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Muhaha!! I remember now! All of Judge's Brats are enhanced*!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That bastard's crazy!! That burning leg of yours is some kind of augmentation, right?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hate to break it to you, but I'm a regular human, unlike my siblings!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are you stupid?! What kind of human can burst into flames?! It's not like you're a LUNARIAN!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: It's possible because my passions...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...burn hotter than any real flame ever could!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Cooking up sea beasts is my specialty, you dino- bastard!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll show you how devastating my cybernetic enhancements can be!! They're so advanced, even vegapunk can't match them!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Don't get distracted, you black Mummy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: That blade ...?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Argh?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: thing

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I get it... you're just a blood- thirsty brute!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've never understood why anyone would stick to...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Traditional forms and techniques in a real battle.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Yeah, I guess you have a point!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You never claimed to be a swordsman after all.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Have it your way!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just remember, when it comes down to it...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...I might be willing to bite through your throat too!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I can't afford to lose here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Boss Hyogoro,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: When HIVori- SAMA...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: offered that man enma,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There was a reason I didn't protest too hard...

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 27 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
